option.name: --abort-on-error
tip: Abort downloading of further videos if an error occurs

option.name: --abort-on-unavailable-fragments
tip: Abort download if a fragment is unavailable

option.name: --add-headers
tip: Specify a custom HTTP header and its value

option.name: --age-limit
tip: Download only videos suitable for the given age

option.name: --alias
tip: Create aliases for an option string

option.name: --ap-mso
tip: Adobe Pass multiple-system operator (TV provider) identifier

option.name: --audio-format
tip: Format to convert the audio to when -x is used

option.name: --audio-multistreams
tip: Allow multiple audio streams to be merged into a single file

option.name: --audio-quality
tip: Specify ffmpeg audio quality: 0 (best) to 10 (worst) for VBR or specific bitrate like 128K (default 5)

option.name: --batch-file
tip: File containing URLs to download ("-" for stdin)

option.name: --bidi-workaround
tip: Work around terminals that lack bidirectional text support

option.name: --break-match-filters
tip: Same as --match-filters but stops download when a video is rejected

option.name: --break-on-existing
tip: Stop download when encountering a file in the archive

option.name: --break-per-input
tip: Alters --max-downloads and similar options to reset per input URL

option.name: --buffer-size
tip: Size of download buffer, e.g. 1024 or 16K (default is 1024)

option.name: --cache-dir
tip: Location in the filesystem where yt-dlp can store downloaded information permanently

option.name: --check-all-formats
tip: Check all formats for whether they are actually downloadable

option.name: --check-formats
tip: Make sure formats are selected only from those that are actually downloadable

option.name: --clean-info-json
tip: Remove some internal metadata such as filenames from the infojson (default)

option.name: --client-certificate
tip: Path to client certificate file in PEM format

option.name: --client-certificate-key
tip: Path to private key file for client certificate

option.name: --client-certificate-password
tip: Password for client certificate private key

option.name: --color
tip: Whether to emit color codes in output

option.name: --compat-options
tip: Options that can help keep compatibility with youtube-dl

next.name: multi_video
tip: Only when the videos form a single show (default)

option.name: --concurrent-fragments
tip: Number of fragments of a dash/hlsnative video to download concurrently

option.name: --config-locations
tip: Location of the main configuration file

option.name: --convert-subtitles
tip: Convert the subtitles to another format

option.name: --convert-thumbnails
tip: Convert the thumbnails to another format

option.name: --cookies
tip: Netscape formatted file to read cookies from

option.name: --cookies-from-browser
tip: The name of the browser to load cookies from

option.name: --date
tip: Download only videos uploaded on this date

option.name: --dateafter
tip: Download only videos uploaded on or after this date

option.name: --datebefore
tip: Download only videos uploaded on or before this date

option.name: --default-search
tip: Use this prefix for unqualified URLs

option.name: --download-archive
tip: Download only videos not listed in the archive file

option.name: --download-sections
tip: Download only chapters that match the regular expression

option.name: --dump-json
tip: Quiet, but print JSON information for each video

option.name: --dump-pages
tip: Print downloaded pages encoded using base64 to debug problems

option.name: --dump-single-json
tip: Quiet, but print JSON information for each URL or infojson passed

option.name: --embed-chapters
tip: Add chapter markers to the video file

option.name: --embed-info-json
tip: Embed the infojson as an attachment to mkv/mka video files

option.name: --embed-metadata
tip: Embed metadata to the video file

option.name: --embed-subs
tip: Embed subtitles in the video (only for mp4, webm and mkv videos)

option.name: --embed-thumbnail
tip: Embed thumbnail in the video as cover art

option.name: --enable-file-urls
tip: Enable file:// URLs (disabled by default for security)

option.name: --exec
tip: Execute a command, optionally prefixed with when to execute it

option.name: --external-downloader
tip: Name or path of the external downloader to use

option.name: --external-downloader-args
tip: Give these arguments to the external downloader

option.name: --extract-audio
tip: Convert video files to audio-only files (requires ffmpeg and ffprobe)

option.name: --extractor-args
tip: Pass ARGS arguments to the IE_KEY extractor

option.name: --extractor-descriptions
tip: Output descriptions of all supported extractors and exit

option.name: --extractor-retries
tip: Number of retries for known extractor errors (default is 3)

option.name: --file-access-retries
tip: Number of times to retry on file access error (default is 3)

option.name: --fixup
tip: Automatically correct known faults of the file

next.name: detect_or_warn
tip: Fix the file if possible, warn otherwise (default)

next.name: force
tip: Try fixing even if the file already exists

option.name: --flat-playlist
tip: Do not extract a playlist's URL result entries

option.name: --force-download-archive
tip: Force download archive entries to be written even if -s is used

option.name: --force-keyframes-at-cuts
tip: Force keyframes at cuts when downloading/splitting/removing sections

option.name: --force-overwrites
tip: Overwrite all video and metadata files (includes --no-continue)

option.name: --format
tip: Video format code, see FORMAT SELECTION for more details

option.name: --format-sort
tip: Sort the formats by the fields given

option.name: --format-sort-force
tip: Force user specified sort order to have precedence over all fields

option.name: --format-sort-reset
tip: Disregard previous user specified sort order and reset to the default

option.name: --fragment-retries
tip: Number of retries for a fragment (default is 10)

option.name: --geo-verification-proxy
tip: Use this proxy to verify the IP address for some geo-restricted sites

option.name: --hls-split-discontinuity
tip: Split HLS playlists to different formats at discontinuities such as ad breaks

option.name: --hls-use-mpegts
tip: Use the mpegts container for HLS videos (default for live streams)

option.name: --http-chunk-size
tip: Size of a chunk for chunk-based HTTP downloading (experimental)

option.name: --ignore-config
tip: Don't load any more configuration files except those given to --config-locations

option.name: --keep-fragments
tip: Keep downloaded fragments on disk after downloading is finished

option.name: --keep-video
tip: Keep the intermediate video file on disk after post-processing

option.name: --lazy-playlist
tip: Process entries in the playlist as they are received

option.name: --legacy-server-connect
tip: Explicitly allow HTTPS connection to servers that do not support RFC 5746

option.name: --limit-rate
tip: Maximum download rate in bytes per second

option.name: --list-extractors
tip: List all supported extractors and exit

option.name: --list-formats
tip: List available formats of each video

option.name: --list-subs
tip: List available subtitles of each video

option.name: --list-thumbnails
tip: List available thumbnails of each video

option.name: --load-info-json
tip: JSON file containing the video information

option.name: --max-filesize
tip: Abort download if filesize is larger than SIZE

option.name: --max-sleep-interval
tip: Maximum number of seconds to sleep

option.name: --merge-output-format
tip: Containers that may be used when merging formats, separated by "/"

option.name: --min-filesize
tip: Abort download if filesize is smaller than SIZE

option.name: --min-sleep-interval
tip: Number of seconds to sleep before each download (minimum time)

option.name: --mtime
tip: Use the Last-modified header to set the file modification time

option.name: --netrc-cmd
tip: Command to execute to get the credentials for an extractor

option.name: --newline
tip: Output progress bar as new lines

option.name: --no-abort-on-error
tip: Continue with next video on download errors (default)

option.name: --no-allow-dynamic-mpd
tip: Do not process dynamic DASH manifests

option.name: --no-audio-multistreams
tip: Only one audio stream is downloaded for each output file (default)

option.name: --no-batch-file
tip: Do not read URLs from batch file (default)

option.name: --no-break-on-existing
tip: Do not stop download when encountering a file in the archive (default)

option.name: --no-break-per-input
tip: --break-on-existing and similar options terminates the entire download queue (default)

option.name: --no-check-formats
tip: Do not check that the formats are actually downloadable

option.name: --no-clean-info-json
tip: Write all fields to the infojson

option.name: --no-continue
tip: Do not resume partially downloaded fragments

option.name: --no-cookies
tip: Do not read/dump cookies from/to file (default)

option.name: --no-cookies-from-browser
tip: Do not load cookies from browser (default)

option.name: --no-embed-info-json
tip: Do not embed the infojson as an attachment to the video file

option.name: --no-embed-metadata
tip: Do not add metadata to file (default)

option.name: --no-flat-playlist
tip: Fully extract the videos of a playlist (default)

option.name: --no-force-keyframes-at-cuts
tip: Do not force keyframes around the chapters when cutting/splitting (default)

option.name: --no-force-overwrites
tip: Do not overwrite the video, but overwrite related files (default)

option.name: --no-format-sort-force
tip: Some fields have precedence over the user specified sort order (default)

option.name: --no-hls-split-discontinuity
tip: Do not split HLS playlists into different formats at discontinuities (default)

option.name: --no-hls-use-mpegts
tip: Do not use the mpegts container for HLS videos

option.name: --no-ignore-no-formats-error
tip: Throw error when no downloadable video formats are found (default)

option.name: --no-js-runtimes
tip: Clear JavaScript runtimes to enable, including defaults

option.name: --no-keep-fragments
tip: Delete downloaded fragments after downloading is finished (default)

option.name: --no-keep-video
tip: Delete the intermediate video file after post-processing (default)

option.name: --no-lazy-playlist
tip: Process videos in the playlist only after the entire playlist is parsed (default)

option.name: --no-live-from-start
tip: Download livestreams from the current time (default)

option.name: --no-mtime
tip: Do not use the Last-modified header to set the file modification time (default)

option.name: --no-part
tip: Do not use .part files - write directly into output file

option.name: --no-playlist
tip: Download only the video, if the URL refers to a video and a playlist

option.name: --no-plugin-dirs
tip: Clear plugin directories to search, including defaults

option.name: --no-prefer-free-formats
tip: Don't give any special preference to free containers (default)

option.name: --no-remote-components
tip: Disallow fetching of all remote components

option.name: --no-remove-chapters
tip: Do not remove any chapters from the file (default)

option.name: --no-resize-buffer
tip: Do not automatically adjust the buffer size

option.name: --no-restrict-filenames
tip: Allow Unicode characters, "&" and spaces in filenames (default)

option.name: --no-simulate
tip: Download the video even if printing/listing options are used

option.name: --no-split-chapters
tip: Do not split video based on chapters (default)

option.name: --no-video-multistreams
tip: Only one video stream is downloaded for each output file (default)

option.name: --no-wait-for-video
tip: Do not wait for scheduled streams (default)

option.name: --no-write-comments
tip: Do not retrieve video comments unless extraction is quick (default)

option.name: --no-write-playlist-metafiles
tip: Do not write playlist metadata when using --write-info-json etc.

option.name: --no-write-thumbnail
tip: Do not write thumbnail image to disk (default)

option.name: --parse-metadata
tip: Parse additional metadata like title/artist from other fields

option.name: --part
tip: Use .part files instead of writing directly into output file (default)

option.name: --paths
tip: The paths where the files should be downloaded

option.name: --playlist-items
tip: Comma-separated playlist_index of the items to download

option.name: --playlist-random
tip: Download playlist videos in random order

option.name: --plugin-dirs
tip: Path to an additional directory to search for plugins

option.name: --postprocessor-args
tip: Give these arguments to the postprocessors

option.name: --prefer-free-formats
tip: Prefer video formats with free containers over non-free ones of the same quality

option.name: --prefer-insecure
tip: Use an unencrypted connection to retrieve information about the video

option.name: --preset-alias
tip: Applies a predefined set of options

option.name: --print
tip: Field name or output template to print to screen

option.name: --print-to-file
tip: Append given template to the file

option.name: --print-traffic
tip: Display sent and read HTTP traffic

option.name: --progress
tip: Show progress bar, even if in quiet mode

option.name: --recode-video
tip: Re-encode the video into another format if necessary

option.name: --remote-components
tip: Remote components to allow yt-dlp to fetch when required

option.name: --remove-chapters
tip: Remove chapters whose title matches the given regular expression

option.name: --remux-video
tip: Remux the video into another container if necessary

option.name: --replace-in-metadata
tip: Replace text in a metadata field using the given regex

option.name: --resize-buffer
tip: The buffer size is automatically resized (default)

option.name: --restrict-filenames
tip: Restrict filenames to only ASCII characters, and avoid "&" and spaces

option.name: --retry-sleep
tip: Time to sleep between retries in seconds

option.name: --simulate
tip: Do not download the video and do not write anything to disk

option.name: --skip-download
tip: Do not download the video but write all related files

option.name: --skip-playlist-after-errors
tip: Number of allowed failures until the rest of the playlist is skipped

option.name: --skip-unavailable-fragments
tip: Skip unavailable fragments for DASH, hlsnative and ISM downloads (default)

option.name: --sleep-requests
tip: Number of seconds to sleep between requests during data extraction

option.name: --sleep-subtitles
tip: Number of seconds to sleep before each subtitle download

option.name: --socket-timeout
tip: Time to wait before giving up, in seconds

option.name: --source-address
tip: Client-side IP address to bind to

option.name: --split-chapters
tip: Split video into multiple files based on internal chapters

option.name: --sponsorblock-api
tip: SponsorBlock API location, defaults to https://sponsor.ajay.app

option.name: --sponsorblock-chapter-title
tip: An output template for the title of the SponsorBlock chapters

option.name: --sponsorblock-mark
tip: SponsorBlock categories to create chapters for, separated by commas

option.name: --sponsorblock-remove
tip: SponsorBlock categories to be removed from the video file

option.name: --sub-format
tip: Subtitle format; accepts formats preference separated by "/"

option.name: --sub-langs
tip: Languages of the subtitles to download, separated by commas

option.name: --throttled-rate
tip: Minimum download rate below which throttling is assumed

option.name: --trim-filenames
tip: Limit the filename length (excluding extension) to the specified number of characters

option.name: --update
tip: Update this program to the latest stable version

option.name: --use-extractors
tip: Extractor names to use separated by commas

option.name: --use-postprocessor
tip: The name of plugin postprocessors to be enabled

option.name: --video-multistreams
tip: Allow multiple video streams to be merged into a single file

option.name: --wait-for-video
tip: Wait for scheduled streams to become available

option.name: --write-all-thumbnails
tip: Write all thumbnail image formats to disk

option.name: --write-comments
tip: Retrieve video comments to be placed in the infojson

option.name: --write-description
tip: Write video description to a .description file

option.name: --write-info-json
tip: Write video metadata to a .info.json file (may contain personal information)

option.name: --write-link
tip: Write an internet shortcut file, depending on the current platform

option.name: --write-pages
tip: Write downloaded intermediary pages to files to debug problems

option.name: --write-playlist-metafiles
tip: Write playlist metadata in addition to video metadata (default)

option.name: --xattrs
tip: Write metadata to the video file's xattrs (using Dublin Core and XDG standards)

option.name: --xff
tip: How to fake X-Forwarded-For HTTP header

option.name: --yes-playlist
tip: Download the playlist, if the URL refers to a video and a playlist (default)

global_option.name: --no-config-locations
tip: Do not load any custom configuration files (default)
